description: A plain screenshot of two paragraphs of news-article body text in black serif font on an off-white background, with no graphics, photos, logos, or design elements. The text reads: 'The DOL has announced expanded federal enforcement targeting discrimination against American workers related to the H-1B visa program, which allows U.S. employers to temporarily hire foreign workers in specialty occupations. At the center of this move is Project Firewall, a collaborative effort with the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC) and other agencies to ensure that "qualified Americans" are given priority in hiring and that employers are held accountable if they misuse H-1B visas.' This is a quoted-text screenshot used to amplify favorable coverage of the DOL's 'Project Firewall' H-1B enforcement initiative, paired with the tweet slogan 'AMERICANS MUST ALWAYS COME FIRST.' Because it is just a text screenshot with no designed graphic elements, is_designed=false.
notable_text: Project Firewall; ensure that "qualified Americans" are given priority in hiring
